login.title: Kernel
login.subtitle: A personal AI that learns who you are, remembers what matters, and gets better with every conversation.
login.hint: No credit card required. Free to start.
login.feature1Desc: Kernel builds a memory of your interests, goals, and style. Every conversation makes the next one better.
login.feature2Desc: Your messages route to the right mind — researcher, coder, writer, or analyst. The Kernel decides who handles what.
login.feature3Desc: Real-time information, not stale training data. Kernel searches the web and cites sources naturally.

modal.resetSent: Password reset link sent. Check your email.
modal.resetSentDesc: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}. Click the link in your email to set a new password.
modal.error: That didn't work. Check your credentials and try again.
modal.legalAgreement: By continuing, you agree to the

subscription.activatingDesc: Confirming your subscription. This usually takes a few seconds.
subscription.title: Unlock Kernel
subscription.signedInAs: Signed in as {{email}}. Subscribe to unlock everything.
subscription.checkoutError: Couldn't open checkout. Try again in a moment.

setPassword.title: Reset your credentials
setPassword.subtitle: Update your password, username, or email. Change one or all.
setPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setPassword.successWithEmail: Changes saved. Check your new email for a confirmation link.
